**UME**

Business Operating System

**High-Fidelity Screen Flows**

UI/UX Reference Document — 20 Screens & User Flows

Document ID: UME-SCREENS-001 v1.0

Date: March 2026

Owner: UME Design & Product

Classification: Internal

**Table of Contents**

# **Introduction**

This document presents 20 high-fidelity screen mockups for the UME Business Operating System platform, covering authentication, the executive dashboard, all major domain modules (Legal, Finance, HR, Risk, GRC, Sales, Work) and global platform utilities. Each screen is rendered at 1280 × 800 pixels and accompanied by a description of its purpose, the user flow it supports, and its screen ID from the UME-UX-001 specification.

**Design System**

All screens follow the UME design system: primary brand navy (\#0B2545), accent royal blue (\#1557A0), Inter typeface, 12-column layout grid, and the full component library including the AppShell (220px fixed sidebar \+ 52px topbar), KPI tiles, DataTables, Kanban boards, Wizard steppers, Slide-over panels, and semantic status badges.

**Authentication**

# **SCR-AUTH-01  Login — Email & Password**

*Module: Authentication   ·   User Flow: UF-01: New Organisation Onboarding*

![][image1]

The primary authentication gateway. Users enter their work email and password, with options for Microsoft or Google SSO. Validates credentials against the identity provider and enforces MFA as required.

# **SCR-AUTH-02  MFA Verification**

*Module: Authentication   ·   User Flow: UF-01: New Organisation Onboarding*

![][image2]

Two-factor authentication step shown after successful password entry. The user enters a 6-digit TOTP code from their authenticator app or requests an SMS backup code.

**Dashboard**

# **SCR-DASH-01  Executive Dashboard**

*Module: Dashboard   ·   User Flow: UF-08: Executive Dashboard Review*

![][image3]

The central command screen for executive roles (CEO, CFO). Displays live KPI tiles for revenue, cash runway, headcount and risk count, with a 12-month revenue chart, compliance status widget, risk summary and people overview.

**Legal — Chombo**

# **SCR-CHM-01  Entity Registry**

*Module: Legal — Chombo   ·   User Flow: UF-03: Register New Legal Entity*

![][image4]

Master list of all legal entities in the group structure. Shows entity type, jurisdiction, company registration number, incorporation date, and the next compliance filing due date. Entry point for the Register New Entity wizard.

# **SCR-CHM-03  Filing Calendar**

*Module: Legal — Chombo   ·   User Flow: UF-07: Mark Compliance Filing Complete*

![][image5]

A month-by-month calendar view of all compliance filing obligations across all entities and jurisdictions. Filings are colour-coded: green (filed), amber (due soon), red (overdue). An urgency panel highlights items due within 7 days.

**Finance — Moyo**

# **SCR-FIN-03  Journal Entry — Create**

*Module: Finance — Moyo   ·   User Flow: UF-02: Post Journal Entry*

![][image6]

Double-entry journal form with real-time debit/credit balance validation. A consequential-clarity warning banner is shown before posting. The entry is locked for editing once posted; corrections require a reversal entry.

# **SCR-FIN-04  Profit & Loss Statement**

*Module: Finance — Moyo   ·   User Flow: UF-08: Executive Dashboard Review*

![][image7]

IFRS-compliant income statement showing revenue, cost of sales, gross profit, operating expenses and EBIT. Includes a highlighted summary card with EBIT margin and a revenue-by-segment bar chart. Export to PDF available.

**Human Resources — Impande**

# **SCR-HR-01  Employee Directory**

*Module: Human Resources — Impande   ·   User Flow: UF-04: Onboard New Employee*

![][image8]

Searchable, filterable master list of all employees across entities and countries. Shows avatar, name, email, role, department, entity, location and hire date. Serves as the entry point to individual employee profiles.

# **SCR-HR-03  New Hire Wizard — Step 2/5**

*Module: Human Resources — Impande   ·   User Flow: UF-04: Onboard New Employee*

![][image9]

Step 2 of the 5-step guided onboarding wizard, capturing role and contract details: job title, department, reporting line, entity, contract type, start date, work location, notice period and probation length.

# **SCR-HR-02  Employee Profile**

*Module: Human Resources — Impande   ·   User Flow: UF-04: Onboard New Employee*

![][image10]

Comprehensive 360° view of a single employee. Tab-based layout covering Overview (personal \+ employment details), Compensation, Leave balances, Performance reviews, and Documents. Includes an activity timeline.

# **SCR-HR-05  Leave Management**

*Module: Human Resources — Impande   ·   User Flow: UF-05: Employee Leave Request*

![][image11]

HR manager view showing all pending and approved leave requests with one-click Approve / Decline actions. Filterable by type (annual, sick, compassionate). Tabs switch to a calendar view or employee leave balances.

**Risk Management**

# **SCR-RSK-01  Risk Register**

*Module: Risk Management   ·   User Flow: UF-06: KRI Threshold Breach*

![][image12]

Tabular register of all identified risks showing inherent vs. residual ratings, category, owner and treatment status. A KPI row surfaces the count of critical, high risks and KRI breaches for at-a-glance monitoring.

# **SCR-RSK-03  KRI Dashboard**

*Module: Risk Management   ·   User Flow: UF-06: KRI Threshold Breach*

![][image13]

Six KRI tiles, each showing the current value, threshold and colour-coded status (green/amber/red). A red alert banner fires when a KRI breaches its threshold, as seen here for the Cash Runway indicator at 4.2 months.

# **SCR-RSK-04  Risk Heat Map**

*Module: Risk Management   ·   User Flow: UF-06: KRI Threshold Breach*

![][image14]

5×5 likelihood-vs-impact heat map with risks plotted by residual score. Cells transition from green (low) through amber to red (critical). A side panel lists the highest-rated risks and shows overall distribution bars.

**Sales — Soko**

# **SCR-SAL-01  Sales Pipeline (Kanban)**

*Module: Sales — Soko*

![][image15]

Kanban board with five stages (Prospecting → Won). Each deal card shows the deal name, value, assigned AE and a coloured left-border for quick identification. KPI tiles show total pipeline value, won revenue, average deal size and win rate.

**Work — Uso**

# **SCR-WRK-01  Sprint Board (Kanban)**

*Module: Work — Uso*

![][image16]

Agile sprint board showing To Do, In Progress, In Review and Done columns. Each card displays the task name, label tag, story points and assignee avatar. A sprint progress bar shows overall completion against the total story point budget.

**Settings**

# **SCR-SET-02  User & Role Management**

*Module: Settings*

![][image17]

Admin screen for managing platform users. Shows name, email, assigned role, entity access scope, last login, and MFA status with a visual on/off badge. Tabs provide access to role definitions, a permissions matrix and an access audit log.

**Finance — Moyo**

# **SCR-FIN-12  Payroll Run Wizard — Step 3/5**

*Module: Finance — Moyo*

![][image18]

Step 3 of the 5-step payroll wizard (Calculate phase). A progress bar tracks the per-employee calculation in real time. A warning banner highlights three changes since the last run. Summary cards show gross pay, deductions and net pay totals.

**GRC — Eneo**

# **SCR-GRC-01  Obligation Register**

*Module: GRC — Eneo*

![][image19]

Centralised register of all regulatory compliance obligations mapped to their source legislation, jurisdiction, owner and frequency. KPI tiles show total count, items due this month, compliance rate and overdue count.

**Global**

# **SCR-GLBL-01  Global Search (⌘K Command Palette)**

*Module: Global*

![][image20]

A full-text, cross-module search overlay triggered by ⌘K. Results are grouped by type (Finance, HR, Legal, etc.) with rich previews showing record type, module badge, and last-updated timestamp. Filter chips narrow results by module.
